title: Kranj、Kranj — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Kranj、Kranjの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

KranjはKranjにある人口37,373の都市です。The capital of the Gorenjska region, the birthplace of poet France Prešeren, with a historic old town and proximity to the stunning Lake Bled and Triglav National Park.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
